headline.preview: Your perfect evening on Yas Island

intro.preview: An evening built for the two of you — a waterside table, a sail at sunset, and the circuit lights to walk home under.

statement.preview: An island built for a single unforgettable evening.

statementDetail.preview: Waterfront dining at **Yas Marina**, a sunset sail and the circuit lights — one evening along a single stretch of water.

pitch.preview:
Picture it: the heat easing off, a table by the water, boats knocking gently against the pontoon while the first courses arrive. Nothing to book twice, nothing to drive to — the whole evening unfolds within a ten-minute walk.

That is what one island does for you: every experience next to the last, so the night keeps its momentum. Scroll on — each chapter below is ready to slot into your evening.

preview.label: // THE EVENING
preview.title: From golden hour to fireworks
preview.intro: Three stops, one waterfront — dinner, a sail, and the lights to finish.

items.title: Dinner on the pontoon
items.body: A waterside table as the marina lights come on — long, unhurried, and close enough to watch the boats come home.

items.title: Sunset sail
items.body: Two hours on the water with the island turning gold behind you — the quietest seat on Yas.

preview.label: // AFTER DARK
preview.title: The night keeps going
preview.intro: When the plates are cleared, the island is only getting started.

items.title: Walk the circuit lights
items.body: The grandstand glow and the track under floodlight — a night walk you can't have anywhere else.

items.title: Late gelato by the water
items.body: The waterfront stays warm and lit past midnight — end the night with a slow walk and something sweet.
